name: Autechre
bio: Autechre monetize through a deep, specialist catalog that benefits from loyal electronic listeners, reissues, and long-form album engagement.
notable_for: Experimental electronic composition, cult prestige, and unusually deep catalog engagement.
career_highlight: Their music remains influential within electronic circles and continues to earn through niche but durable demand.
revenue_drivers: Dedicated listeners sustain long-tail streaming despite limited mainstream volume.
Collector and reissue demand adds depth to catalog economics.
Prestige within electronic music keeps the catalog discoverable over time.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Autechre's current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Autechre's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
